svg.title: CrisisNexus step-by-step data flow sequence
svg.desc: Twelve numbered steps: external sources write to signals, batching engine groups to signal_batches, CIRO reads batch and writes crisis candidates, confidence filter accepts or rejects, accepted crisis stored in crises, resource allocation engine writes to allocations, citizen submits to relief_requests with dedup check, admin approves dispatches, Firestore streams update dashboards and app, all events logged to system_logs.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Step 1: how do external APIs write signals to Firestore?')
g.text: Weather, traffic, citizen app, field reports → signals collection (processed:false)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Step 2: how does the signal batching engine group signals?')
g.text: Within 2 km + 10-min window → writes to signal_batches (status:pending)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Step 3: how does CIRO read a batch and trigger Gemini?')
g.text: 3 — CIRO reads pending batch, calls Gemini

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Step 4: how does the confidence filter decide what to accept?')
g.text: confidence >= 0.65 → proceed · below threshold → discard candidate

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Step 5: what gets written to the crises collection?')
g.text: crisisId, type, severity, confidence, affectedPopulation, status:active

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Step 6: how does resource allocation trigger from a new crisis?')
g.text: Reads severity + affectedPopulation → writes to allocations collection

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Step 7: how does a citizen submit an aid request in ReliefCycle?')
g.text: 7 — Citizen submits aid request via app
ReliefCycle checks dedupeKey → reject if exists, else write relief_requests

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Step 8: what is the full status flow for a relief request?')
sendPrompt('Step 9: how do Firestore streams update the dashboards in real time?')
g.text: 9 — Firestore streams push updates to all clients
Admin: crises + allocations + relief_requests + logs · Citizen: crises + own requests

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What events get written to system_logs in CrisisNexus?')
g.text: 10 — Every action logged to system_logs (module, event, timestamp)
